notifications.title: Return to the syllabus
notifications.message: One honest revision today is worth more than another elaborate plan you will not follow.

notifications.title: Recall before reading again
notifications.message: Close the notes, retrieve what you know, then study the gaps your memory actually revealed.

notifications.title: Your plan earns no marks
notifications.message: UPSC evaluates what you can recall under pressure, not the timetable you created and repeatedly ignored.

notifications.title: Restart without the drama
notifications.message: A difficult day does not need a perfect recovery. Complete one useful revision and begin again from there.

notifications.title: Do the scheduled work
notifications.message: Motivation can be absent. Your revision slot, PYQs, and mock analysis still need to happen.

notifications.title: The mock exposed the gap
notifications.message: A poor score is useful when every wrong answer becomes a correction you can retrieve next time.

notifications.title: The syllabus will not shrink
notifications.message: Every postponed revision leaves the same material waiting inside a calendar with fewer days remaining.

notifications.title: Confidence follows evidence
notifications.message: Each recalled fact, analysed mistake, and completed mock gives you a reason to trust your preparation.

notifications.title: Protect the chain today
notifications.message: A smaller completed session keeps preparation alive better than a perfect session endlessly postponed.

notifications.title: PYQs reveal the examination
notifications.message: Stop guessing what matters. Analyse how UPSC asks, eliminates, repeats themes, and punishes shallow understanding.

notifications.title: Resources are not preparation
notifications.message: Collecting PDFs feels productive because it avoids the harder work of learning, recalling, and being tested.

notifications.title: Begin with five questions
notifications.message: When the whole syllabus feels heavy, reduce the decision: answer five questions and let momentum decide what follows.
